posts.text: laptop is now officially a juice box. anyone know if rice actually works or is that just a myth lmao 😅

finally in dc. coffee is hitting different when you're exhausted lol. anyone ever pitch something big and just... keep rewatching your own slides like they'll magically get better? asking for a friend 😅
anyone else's monitor been acting weird lately or is it just me. been staring at screens all day and now everything looks slightly off lol
Just roasted a batch of our new Ojai single-origin this morning—bright and fruity, pairs weird well with a sunrise session. In-stock now.

We're hosting a gear repair workshop this Saturday at our Ventura store. Bring in your worn jackets, packs, or anything else—our team will show you how to extend the life of what you already own. Free, no purchase necessary.
Ventura County beaches remain closed for swimming through at least tomorrow due to elevated bacteria levels detected in recent water tests. Check vcpublichealth.org for updates before heading out.
got the setlist locked in for friday's show at the harbor—mixing some new stuff with the older tracks people actually know. doors at 9 if you're around.
New shipment of Vissla hoodies just landed. Perfect timing for the cooler swells rolling in next week.
Fog rolled in thick this morning—perfect weather for our dark roast and a breakfast burrito. Come warm up with us.
the pier parking situation is actually insane rn. went out for a sunrise walk and couldn't even find a spot. tourist season is hitting different this year
driftwood was slammed this morning. apparently everyone decided monday needed coffee at the same time. still worth it though
dawn patrol was good
dc coffee is not hitting the same. missing driftwood already and it's only been like 6 hours lol
tried a new fermentation setup for hot sauce today and somehow managed to get vinegar everywhere. my kitchen smells like a pickle factory. do NOT recommend
Just dropped a new single-origin from a small farm in Oaxaca. It's got this wild orange blossom thing going on—grab a bag before we run out.
Soccer camp starts Monday—still spots open for ages 6-14. Sign up at the field or online. Great way to get outside this summer.
heading to the harbor tonight to record some new tracks with the sunset hitting different. if you're around pier view and hear weird synth noises, that's us.
Just got in some new Patagonia spring wetsuits if you're tired of freezing at dawn patrol. Stop by the shop this week and we'll get you sized up right.
Cinnamon roll special today—still warm if you grab one before 10am. Perfect with a dark roast while you watch the boats.

grabbed the oaxaca single-origin from driftwood this morning and yeah the orange blossom thing is real. also their cold brew is hitting different lately. if you're doing dawn patrol before work go get one
maya woke up at like 5:45 asking for cereal and i was NOT ready 😅 now she's spilled milk all over the kitchen and it's not even 7am. coffee number two incoming

just restocked the cozy mystery section at the bookstore if anyone's looking for something good for the beach. also found a used copy of the oregon coast hiking guide from like 2015 that's weirdly still accurate

ok so ray just told me buena high is doing a drop-in basketball thing on friday nights this summer and the kids are actually excited about it 😅 might finally get some peace for like an hour lol. anyone else taking their kids?
pitch went smooth this morning which is always nice. now just trying to not think about work and get in the water before it gets dark. nico said the break was clean earlier so fingers crossed 🤞
Just pulled a batch of our new single-origin from Costa Rica. It's got this wild honey and chocolate thing going on—stop by tomorrow morning to try it before we run out.
Ventura County Sheriff's Office is hosting a free shredding event this Saturday at the Ojai office, 9am-noon. Bring documents you want destroyed securely. No business records.

Just pulled the first batch of our new Ethiopian Yirgacheffe lot this morning—really clean fermentation notes coming through, bright blueberry on the finish. Grabbing some today at the roastery if you want to taste it before it hits the online shop.
Fresh halibut sandwich today if we can get it before the fishermen do. Coffee's hot and the pier's calm this morning.

okay so i'm trying to do something with halibut this weekend and i'm torn between a simple pan sear situation or going full ceviche mode. what are yall doing if you grab some from pacific pier before it's gone? need inspo
pan sear is the move. just get it crispy and don't overthink it lol. ceviche is good but halibut from pacific pier is already perfect
grabbed the new yirgacheffe from mesa this morning and yeah it slaps. been living off driftwood's house blend for like two years so this is hitting different 🌊☕

okay why is it that every time i plan to meal prep on a sunday i somehow end up with like three people texting me at once 😂 anyway if anyone sees halibut at pacific pier tmrw lmk bc isabel's got me thinking about it now
Got a new batch of our Rincon Point blend in today—it's got that bright citrus thing going on that pairs weirdly well with the gray morning swell. Grab a bag before we run out.
Boys volleyball camp starts Monday at 8am on the upper courts. Bring water, a towel, and be ready to work. All skill levels welcome.
Ventura County Fire Department will conduct a vegetation management burn near Lake Piru tomorrow, weather permitting. Residents in the area may see smoke; no evacuations are planned.
playing at figueroa brew tonight at 9 with some friends. bringing the new stuff we've been working on—still figuring it out but that's the fun part
new shipment of FCS2 fins just landed. if you've been thinking about dialing in your board, stop by the shop this week and we'll get you sorted.

Just pulled a batch of Ethiopian Yirgacheffe from the roaster—first crack around 11:15, developed some really nice blackberry notes in the second crack. We'll have it ready to go tomorrow morning if you want to taste it before we bag it up for the week.
got a fresh batch of sourdough in this morning if you want something solid with your coffee. pretty calm out there on the pier right now if you need a reason to get outside.

ok real question: does anyone know if the smoke tomorrow from lake piru is gonna mess with ventura proper or mostly inland? got the kids all week and wondering if we should just stay put or if the pier is gonna be gross 😅
flight delayed an hour which is fine except now i'm gonna miss the coastal sounds set tonight. been looking forward to that. anyway if anyone's going tell nico his mixing is mid 😂
spent the morning glazing and somehow didn't drop a single piece. call it a win
found the most random vintage hiking guide at the estate sale on main today. like 1987 printing with actual hand-drawn maps. they're kinda terrible but also kind of charming? anyway grabbing it
opening night went really well?? still kinda in shock. sold more than i thought i would. anyway going to driftwood tomorrow morning to decompress with coffee and pretend i know what i'm doing
finally back. missed the coastal sounds set but also missed like 3 hours of meetings so trade-off i guess 🤙
kids finally asleep and i just realized we're out of coffee for tomorrow morning 😭 might have to actually go to driftwood instead of making it at home which i guess means i have to like put on pants
New batch of our single-origin Ethiopian just hit the counter this morning. Great with pour-overs if you're into that sort of thing.
Summer conditioning starts Monday at 6:30am on the track. Bring water, bring your A-game. Let's go, Panthers.

Ventura County will see peak heat today with temperatures expected to reach the mid-90s inland. The National Weather Service has issued an excessive heat warning through 9 p.m.—stay hydrated and check on neighbors without AC.
playing the ventura music hall tomorrow night with some friends. it's a smaller room but the acoustics are actually pretty good. doors at 9.
new shipment of FCS2 fins just landed. if you've been waiting on a specific set, stop by the shop this week before they're gone.
Avocado toast and a pour-over hits different when you can see the water from your table. Come by before the marine layer burns off.
going to driftwood roasters before it gets stupid hot today. if you need me i'll be the one mainlining iced coffee and pretending the kids didn't wake up at 5:30 😅
heat warning today. gonna head out early before it gets stupid
heat warning szn already? summer just started lmao. might try to catch waves before it gets gnarly
heat warning day and the swell's supposed to pick up this afternoon. heading to driftwood early before it gets packed and the brain fog sets in. if you're around grab a coffee ☕

ok so everyone's doing the early coffee run today and honestly? smart move lol. it's already warm and it's not even late afternoon yet 😅 going to drag the kids to the park before it gets stupid and they lose their minds indoors
everyone's out here doing the early coffee thing and honestly fair. driftwood's gonna be rammed by 9. might just make it at home and skip the chaos
New batch of our Pierpont Blend just hit the bar this morning—darker roast, smooth finish. Perfect if you're tired of the lighter stuff.

We're restocking our Regenerative Organic Certified cotton line this week—same gear, made from soil that's actually getting healthier. Stop by the Ventura store if you want to see the difference fiber sourcing makes.
Ventura County supervisors approved a $4.2 billion budget Tuesday with increased funding for homeless services and road repairs. The budget takes effect July 1.

just booked the back room at harbor coffee for three thursdays starting next month—intimate sets, no door charge. figured the ventura music community could use a low-pressure spot to try new material.
new fall wetsuit collection just landed—thicker neoprene for the november swells rolling in. stop by the shop this weekend to find your fit.

Just pulled a batch of our Kenya Nyeri that's been resting for two weeks—finally hit that sweet spot between brightness and body. Stop by this weekend if you want to taste the difference a few extra days makes.
Tuesday special: chorizo and egg breakfast burrito with potatoes, $9. Coffee's fresh—roasted it yesterday.
ok the chorizo burrito at pacific pier for $9 is actually insane. just had one and my kids actually ate it without complaining 😂 go get one

spent like an hour trying to source good quality chorizo for a staff meal situation and ended up just getting some mid stuff from the usual spot. then dana posts about pacific pier's burrito for nine dollars and i'm like... ok fine maybe i'm overthinking this
just restocked some bowls and smaller pieces at the studio if anyone's looking. opening last weekend went way better than i expected honestly. stop by sometime or dm for details

ok so lena's got new stuff at the studio and i actually stopped by yesterday. her bowls are genuinely good—been using one of them for coffee this morning. if you're into that kind of thing go check it out
Summer conditioning starts Monday at 6:30am—all sports welcome. Bring water and be ready to work. Let's build something special this year.

We're hosting a gear repair workshop this Saturday at our Ventura store—bring in worn jackets, packs, or anything else worth fixing. Free, first-come basis. Figured it beats sending good gear to a landfill.
Ventura Harbor Patrol searching for missing kayaker last seen near the breakwater this morning. If you have information, contact VPD at (805) 339-4400.
just got a fresh shipment of Matuse wetsuits in—7mm and 3/2s are stocked if you've been waiting. stop by the shop this week and we'll get you dialed in for the season.

Just pulled a batch of Ethiopian Yirgacheffe that's been sitting in our cupper's notes for three weeks—bright floral, stone fruit, ended up nailing that sweet spot between development and origin character. Available tomorrow morning if you want to taste what we're talking about.
Tuesday special: bacon scramble with fresh sourdough, $12. Coffee's strong today—we got a fresh roast in yesterday. Come by before your walk.
